languages.text: "Хм... в архивах этот мир обозначен как... "утративший ценность". Что это еще за гриф такой? Пока на планете есть атмосфера и хотя бы клочок ресурсов, такое списание в утиль — преступление против династии!"

traits.locale_text: "Хм... в архивах этот мир обозначен как... "утративший ценность". Что это еще за гриф такой? Пока на планете есть атмосфера и хотя бы клочок ресурсов, такое списание в утиль — преступление против династии!"

languages.text: "Hmm... In the archives, this world is flagged as... 'of no further value.' What manner of classification is that? So long as a planet retains an atmosphere and at least a scrap of resources, such a write-off is a crime against the dynasty!"
languages.original_text: "Хм... в архивах этот мир обозначен как... "утративший ценность". Что это еще за гриф такой? Пока на планете есть атмосфера и хотя бы клочок ресурсов, такое списание в утиль — преступление против династии!"

traits.locale_text: "Hmm... in the archives, this world is flagged as... 'value voided'. What manner of classification is that? So long as a planet retains an atmosphere and at least a scrap of resources, such consignment to waste is a crime against the dynasty!"

"Hmm... in the archives, this world is flagged as... 'value voided'. What manner of classification is that? So long as a planet retains an atmosphere and at least a scrap of resources, such consignment to waste is a crime against the dynasty!"

"Hmm... In the archives, this world is flagged as... 'of no value'. What manner of classification is that? So long as a planet retains an atmosphere and at least a scrap of resources, such a write-off is a crime against the dynasty!"

"Hmm... In the archives, this world is flagged as... 'of no value'. What manner of classification is that? So long as a planet retains an atmosphere and at least a scrap of resources, such a write-off is a crime against the dynasty!"

languages.text: "Hmm ... In den Archiven ist diese Welt eingestuft als ... wertlos. Was für eine Klassifizierung ist das denn? Solange ein Planet eine Atmosphäre und ein wenigstens paar Ressourcen hat, ist eine derartige Abschreibung ein Verbrechen gegen die Dynastie!"
languages.original_text: "Hmm... In the archives, this world is flagged as... 'of no value.' What manner of classification is that? So long as a planet retains an atmosphere and at least a scrap of resources, such a write-off is a crime against the dynasty!"

traits.locale_text: "Hmm ... In den Archiven ist diese Welt eingestuft als ... wertlos. Was für eine Klassifizierung ist das denn? Solange ein Planet eine Atmosphäre und ein wenigstens paar Ressourcen hat, ist eine derartige Abschreibung ein Verbrechen gegen die Dynastie!"

languages.text: « Hmm… Dans les archives, ce monde est catégorisé comme "sans valeur". Quel genre de classification est-ce donc là ? Tant qu'une planète possède une atmosphère et ne serait-ce qu’une poignée de ressources, la dédaigner est un crime contre la dynastie ! »
languages.original_text: "Hmm... In the archives, this world is flagged as... 'of no value.' What manner of classification is that? So long as a planet retains an atmosphere and at least a scrap of resources, such a write-off is a crime against the dynasty!"

traits.locale_text: « Hmm… Dans les archives, ce monde est catégorisé comme "sans valeur". Quel genre de classification est-ce donc là ? Tant qu'une planète possède une atmosphère et ne serait-ce qu’une poignée de ressources, la dédaigner est un crime contre la dynastie ! »

languages.text: “嗯……在档案库里，这个世界被标记为……‘毫无价值’。这算什么分类？一颗行星只要还有大气层，哪怕只剩一丁点资源，就这样被一笔否认也是对王朝的犯罪！”
languages.original_text: "Hmm... In the archives, this world is flagged as... 'of no value.' What manner of classification is that? So long as a planet retains an atmosphere and at least a scrap of resources, such a write-off is a crime against the dynasty!"

traits.locale_text: “嗯……在档案库里，这个世界被标记为……‘毫无价值’。这算什么分类？一颗行星只要还有大气层，哪怕只剩一丁点资源，就这样被一笔否认也是对王朝的犯罪！”

languages.text: «Mmm... En los archivos, este mundo está catalogado como "carente de valor". ¿Quién asignó esa categoría? Si un planeta tiene atmósfera y un mínimo de recursos, ¡desestimarlo así es un crimen contra la dinastía!».
languages.original_text: "Hmm... In the archives, this world is flagged as... 'of no value.' What manner of classification is that? So long as a planet retains an atmosphere and at least a scrap of resources, such a write-off is a crime against the dynasty!"

traits.locale_text: «Mmm... En los archivos, este mundo está catalogado como "carente de valor". ¿Quién asignó esa categoría? Si un planeta tiene atmósfera y un mínimo de recursos, ¡desestimarlo así es un crimen contra la dinastía!».

languages.text: 私の記録によると、この世界は "失われた価値 "と表示されている。王朝の財産としては興味深い表現だ"
languages.original_text: "According to my records, this world is labelled 'lost value'. That's an interesting wording for a dynasty property."

languages.text: "Arşivlerde bu dünya... 'Değersiz' olarak işaretlenmiş. Bu nasıl bir sınıflandırma? Bir gezegen, bir atmosferi ve en azından bir parça kaynağı elinde tuttuğu sürece böyle bir silme işlemi hanedanlığa işlenmiş bir suçtur!"
languages.original_text: "Hmm... In the archives, this world is flagged as... 'of no value.' What manner of classification is that? So long as a planet retains an atmosphere and at least a scrap of resources, such a write-off is a crime against the dynasty!"

traits.locale_text: "Arşivlerde bu dünya... 'Değersiz' olarak işaretlenmiş. Bu nasıl bir sınıflandırma? Bir gezegen, bir atmosferi ve en azından bir parça kaynağı elinde tuttuğu sürece böyle bir silme işlemi hanedanlığa işlenmiş bir suçtur!"
